query:
INSERT INTO users (id, name, email, password, loginMethod, role, managerId, companyId, isActive, createdAt, lastSignedIn)
SELECT 
  CONCAT('baggio_', SUBSTRING(id, POSITION('_' IN id)+1)),
  name,
  CONCAT('baggio_', SUBSTRING(email, 1, POSITION('@' IN email)-1), '@baggio.com'),
  password,
  loginMethod,
  role,
  CASE WHEN managerId IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT('baggio_', SUBSTRING(managerId, POSITION('_' IN managerId)+1)) ELSE NULL END,
  'company_baggio_001',
  isActive,
  NOW(),
  NOW()
FROM users 
WHERE companyId = 'company_delmack_001'
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE email = VALUES(email)
